title: Milestone Registry Architecture
purpose: Eliminate monolithic milestone storage and ad hoc secondary files by introducing a registry-based discovery model with modular domain-scoped milestone files.
architectural_constraints: Registry is the ONLY authoritative discovery mechanism
Domain milestone files must be self-contained and schema-valid
All existing tools must resolve milestones through the registry
Global ID uniqueness must be enforced at aggregation time
Old milestones.json must be deprecated, not deleted immediately

deliverables.description: Authoritative milestone registry with file discovery and load order
Directory containing modular domain milestone files
Core product milestones M1-M10 extracted from monolith
Governance milestones M11-M19 extracted from governance-milestones.json
JSON Schema for milestone registry validation
Aggregation layer: registry discovery + file resolution + validation + uniqueness enforcement

acceptance_criteria: All 19 milestones load correctly through the registry
validate-pm.js resolves milestones via registry, not hardcoded paths
Duplicate milestone IDs across files are detected and rejected
Old milestones.json and governance-milestones.json marked deprecated with pointer to registry

traceability.description: Implemented milestone registry architecture with modular domain files and aggregation layer
